generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor that converts supplied current I_M into torque τ_M and angular velocity ω_M."
]
instance StandardGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Standard gearbox transmitting motor torque to the robot's first vertical axis."
]
instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox that further transmits torque to the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
]
instance CNCControllerSINUMERIK840D : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller issuing position, speed and acceleration command signals to the motor."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring supplied current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor shaft providing angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance SecondaryEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox providing post‑gearbox angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance DerivedTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived torque τ calculated by the CNC controller from current and motor model."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
]
instance DerivedAngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity ω calculated from encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]
instance DerivedAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration α calculated from velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]
instance MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]
instance SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoderSensor
]
instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedTorqueSensor
]
instance DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedAngularVelocitySensor
]
instance DerivedAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedAccelerationSensor
]

// C10: Data (from DataTransmitted) and Models
instance MotorCurrentTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of motor current I_M streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]
instance MotorEncoderAngleTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of motor encoder angle streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]
instance SecondaryEncoderAngleTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of secondary encoder angle streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]
instance DerivedTorqueTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque τ trace streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]
instance DerivedAngularVelocityTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity ω trace streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]
instance DerivedAccelerationTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration α trace streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance SysMLMotorBlockModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]
instance SysMLGearboxBlockModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition model of the standard and cycloidal gearboxes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]
instance SysMLAxisIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML internal block diagram model of the first vertical axis integrating motor and gear transmissions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]
instance SimulinkFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing frictionless behavior of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]
instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑viscous friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]
instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]
instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Dahl friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]
instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing LuGre friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for block definition and internal block diagram modeling of motor, gearboxes and connections."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataComparisonService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]
instance MATLABSimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and frictionless simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, FrictionParameterGenerationService
]
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker transmitting live sensor streams and derived quantities as time‑series data traces."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, DataComparisonService
]
instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing standardized model integration for the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterGenerationService
]
instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom real‑time visualization dashboard displaying measured and simulated torque/velocity."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, DataComparisonService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard service."
    DTDFVocab:provides DiagnosticVisualizationInsight
]
instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "White‑box and black‑box friction model identification service."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterExtractionInsight
]
instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated versus measured torque and velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:provides DiagnosticVisualizationInsight
]
instance FrictionParameterGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of updated friction parameters for improved robot control accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedFrictionModelAction, ControlParameterFeedbackAction
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance FrictionParameterExtractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extraction of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters from measured data."
]
instance UpdatedFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates friction model parameters and feeds them back to the robot controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance DiagnosticVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostic visualizations for operators showing model fit and deviations."
]
instance ControlParameterFeedbackAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feeds updated friction parameters into the CNC controller to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Component and Environment (optional contextualization)
instance FirstAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot including motor, gearboxes and sensors."
]
instance FrictionShadow : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxisComponent, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, StandardGearbox, CycloidalGearbox, CNCControllerSINUMERIK840D
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual‑to‑physical interaction; the digital shadow is a passive one‑way data consumer and does not send commands or data back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Online real‑time synchronization with the robot’s sensor streams, enabling continuous identification of friction during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow consists of a purpose (FrictionDerivation), the asset (first axis of MABI robot), processing components (simulation models for motor, gearwheel, gearbox), data traces (measured and simulated), and a dashboard that aggregates and visualizes the results."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational stage – the digital shadow is created and used while the robot is in service to monitor and improve motion accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured by comparing simulated torque/velocity traces against measured data; traceability is provided through the processing component links; continuous identification accounts for wear, tool changes, and temperature variations to maintain validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow via the MQTT protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The approach utilizes the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for component description, SysML as a standardized systems modeling language, and MQTT as a standard IoT messaging protocol for data transport."
]
